name: Beacon Hill Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Beat egg whites until foamy. Slowly add sugar, one tablespoon at a time, beating after each addition until the meringues stand in stiff peaks.
3. Stir in vinegar and vanilla.
4. Fold in chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto prepared baking sheets.
6. Bake for 10 minutes.
7. With a spatula, remove meringues immediately and place on a wire rack to cool.
Makes 3 dozen.
